author: codex-agent

patch.value: Simplify command inputs for setup-agnostic agent workflows

Audit and harden pm CLI command input ergonomics so agents can provide rich metadata once, recover from validation failures with actionable guidance, and rely on intuitive inference instead of strict setup-specific schemas.

Commands accept intuitive rich agent input without dropping metadata; validation failures preserve actionable recovery guidance; temp project end-to-end dogfood passes; changed files/tests/docs are linked; full coverage and GitHub checks are green.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: ran pm context --limit 10,pm search simplify commands parameters schema strict agent input intuitive --limit 10,pm list-open --limit 20,pm list-in-progress --limit 20,and pm search create strict repeatable metadata shorthand command intuitive agents retry --limit 10. Existing agent UX items are closed or broad parent work; pm-rnpb is the canonical parent,so this dedicated child tracks the current command-simplification audit.

message: Create command input simplification audit task

value.command: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/create-command.spec.ts tests/unit/update-command.spec.ts tests/unit/files-docs-command.spec.ts tests/unit/test-command.spec.ts

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Evidence: implemented forgiving repeatable-entry parsing for create/update/files/docs/test so bare dependency IDs infer kind=related, bare file/doc paths infer path with project scope, bare linked test values infer command, and rich comment/note/learning seeds with extra key-like metadata are preserved as text instead of failing and causing lossy retries. Verification passed: temp project end-to-end dogfood with isolated PM_PATH/PM_GLOBAL_PATH; pm linked tests passed including coverage 90 files/1252 tests at 100%; focused command suite 129 tests passed; pnpm quality:static passed; scripts/check-secrets passed. pm validate and pm health still report only the pre-existing history drift warnings on pm-54d, pm-f3q4, pm-fdla, pm-mb4n, and pm-tq1.

author: codex-agent

patch.value: Intuitive command input parsing implemented and verified end to end; rich agent metadata is preserved across create/update/link/test workflows.

message: Close: intuitive command input parsing verified

patch.value: Implemented forgiving repeatable-entry parsing while preserving all rich agent-provided metadata as text when it cannot fit a narrower log schema.
Agents can pass intuitive bare IDs, paths, commands, and rich log text once without needing lossy retry simplification after a validation failure.
Create/update/files/docs/test workflows accept the intuitive forms in unit tests and an isolated temp-project dogfood run; rich key-like comment/note/learning payloads remain stored verbatim.
